inputs.label: Refractive Index of First Medium (n₁)
inputs.businessContext: Refractive index of the incident medium. Must be greater than n2 for total internal reflection.

inputs.label: Refractive Index of Second Medium (n₂)
inputs.businessContext: Refractive index of the transmitting medium. Must be less than n1.

inputs.label: Angle Unit (0=degrees, 1=radians)
inputs.businessContext: Specify output angle unit. 0 for degrees, 1 for radians.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for displayed output. (1-6)
